description_long: This is a compact, two-story brick pizzeria with a flat roof, featuring a prominent red-orange facade and a striped green-and-white awning above the entrance. The building has four windows on each of the main visible sides, some with shutters and others with blinds, adding to its urban charm. The roof is bordered by a stone parapet and includes a brick chimney with two metal flues, as well as a patch of green moss or paint and a rooftop utility box. The front wall displays some weathering and a patch of exposed brick, suggesting age and character. A vertical metal pipe runs down one side of the building, likely for drainage or utilities. The entrance is recessed, with a small step and a wooden door adjacent to the awning, giving the impression of a cozy, street-level pizzeria in a bustling city neighborhood.
description: A two-story red-orange brick pizzeria with a striped awning, flat roof, and a prominent brick chimney, exuding classic urban character.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a green-and-white striped awning, two windows above, a weathered patch on the wall, and a vertical pipe running down the right side.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals three windows, the brick chimney with two flues on the roof, and the edge of the awning protruding from the front.
description_view_2: The rear view displays four windows, a plain red-orange wall, and the rooftop details including the chimney and utility box.
description_view_3: The left side view shows three windows, the brick chimney, a rooftop patch, and the edge of the awning visible at the front.
